arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man Utd to go head-to-head in transfer battle for Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United are on a collision course as they both seek long-term replacements for their respective left-backs, according to reports. arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott sends one-word Liverpool message as injury update given
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to be without Harvey Elliott for a period of time with a fractured foot

arts.ttl: Liverpool identify exciting four man shortlist as they plan for life without Van Dijk
arts.sum: Liverpool have identified four centre backs as possible replacements for Virgil van Dijk according to reports with uncertainty surrounding the Dutchman’s future. Van Dijk is one of three key players out of contract at the end of season, along with Trent Alexander-Arnold and Mohamed Salah. arts.ttl: Liverpool fans stopped in their tracks as goalkeeper Alisson sports brand-new look
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson has been a key player since his arrival from Italian giants Roma in 2018 but will look slightly different on his next outing for the club after opting for a new look

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed possible boost in pursuit of 24-year-old England international
arts.sum: Liverpool are primed to go head-to-head with Newcastle over the signing of Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi. The England international came close to joining the Magpies in the summer, but Palace rejected four bids, with the highest in the region of £70 million. arts.ttl: Liverpool top transfer target issues 'come and get me' January plea
arts.sum: Liverpool ’s biggest transfer target from the summer is reportedly having regrets over turning down a move to Anfield after a slow start to the new season for his club. Liverpool have not indicated any future transfer plans as of yet, with the club determined to assess the early days of Slot’s tenure first, while also focusing on new contracts for Trent Alexander-Arnold, Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah .

arts.ttl: Chiesa moment, Nunez update – Five things spotted in Liverpool training before Bournemouth clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot has been putting his players through their paces at the AXA Training Centre as Liverpool gear up to face Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s plan to ward off Arsenal and Liverpool interest in England star
arts.sum: Newcastle have a plan to ensure that Anthony Gordon stays at the club amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool, according to the latest reports. The outlet reports that: "Newcastle will offer to make Anthony Gordon their highest earner on a deal worth close to £9million per season as they try to convince him to stay."

arts.ttl: What happened on plane when Inter Milan supporters spotted Liverpool fans returning home
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as some Reds fans were joined by Inter Milan supporters on a flight travelling from Italy to England this week

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold explains how Arne Slot inspired Liverpool comeback to beat AC Milan
arts.sum: Liverpool recovered from conceding an early goal to overpower AC Milan in the San Siro and Trent Alexander-Arnold says Arne Slot changes his tactics constantly from the sidelines
